title: PB-149 VERIFIED: Runtime Unique Extraction Program
scope: Runtime-unique branch extraction program only. Review-only evidence; no branch or runtime mutation authorized.

summary.final_recommendation: Extract unique runtime deltas by wave into scoped governance/* branches; hold blocked runtime hardening fail-closed.

extraction_sequence.description: Extract unique runtime policy/gateway/intake files that provide executable governance value first.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

extraction_sequence.description: Extract supporting runtime modules only after wave 1 validates cleanly.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

extraction_sequence.description: Extract unique branch/release governance code after runtime core is stable.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

extraction_sequence.description: Extract foundational evidence integrity, signature, RFC3161, and action policy controls.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

extraction_sequence.description: Extract lower-priority evidence policy tail after foundation controls are validated.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

extraction_sequence.description: Hold runtime hardening branch fail-closed until validation/test-context blocker closes.
exit_criteria: full suite required before merge readiness

rollback_plan.strategy: Separate scoped extraction branch; revert extraction commit if validation fails.

resolution.resolution_source: PB-152 VERIFIED: Governance Runtime Hardening Blocker Resolution
resolution.resolved_reason: EDGEGUARD_SUBPROCESS_INTERPRETER_DRIFT resolved by explicit subprocess interpreter selection and focused Edgeguard validation.
remaining_guards: human review by USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 remains required
full repository pytest remains required before merge readiness
runtime extraction must occur in a separate scoped PR
